question: Paul contrasts what is seen as foolishness by many with what believers experience as God’s power. What does Paul specifically call “the power of God” in that contrast?

choices.C: The wisdom traditions of the elders

teaching.title: Power of God vs worldly wisdom
teaching.body: Paul explicitly says that “the message (word) of the cross” is the power of God for those who are being saved, while it is seen as folly by those who are perishing.
